raw_consumer_statement:
I was in XXXX, XXXX ( XXXX XXXX XXXX ) using my physical Barclays credit card, so its impossible the same card was used in XXXX XXXX Their records should confirm this the charges in XXXX XXXX are fraudulent and should be removed. 

On XX/XX/year> I faxed a letter to Barclays Card Services ( Fraud Investigation Unit ) @ XXXX disputing the charges ( Account ID # : XXXX ). In addition, I attached a copy of my airline itinerary as proof that I was out of the country during the time the unauthorized transactions occurred. They have yet to respond with any evidence proving otherwise.
